name: app-assurmoi-api
description: API REST AssurMoi — Express, Sequelize, MariaDB (sinistres, dossiers, documents, Yousign, audit, notifications).
author: Mamadou Barry <mabarry2018@gmail.com>

scripts.db:migrate: docker compose run app-assurmoi-node npx sequelize-cli db:migrate
scripts.db:migrate:undo: docker compose run app-assurmoi-node npx sequelize-cli db:migrate:undo
scripts.db:seed: docker compose run app-assurmoi-node npx sequelize-cli db:seed:all
scripts.db:seed:undo: docker compose run app-assurmoi-node npx sequelize-cli db:seed:undo
scripts.db:seed:undo:all: docker compose run app-assurmoi-node npx sequelize-cli db:seed:undo:all
scripts.db:generate:migration: docker compose run app-assurmoi-node npx sequelize-cli migration:generate
